Content:
## DruidJS — A JavaScript Library for Dimensionality Reduction. DruidJS is a JavaScript library for dimensionality reduction. With dimesionality reduction you can project high-dimensional data to a lower dimensionality while keeping method-specific properties of the data. DruidJS makes it easy to project a dataset with the implemented dimensionality reduction methods.
![Codecov](https://img.shields.io/codecov/c/github/saehm/DruidJS) ![NPM Downloads](https://img.shields.io/npm/dw/%40saehrimnir%2Fdruidjs) ![GitHub Actions Workflow Status](https://img.shields.io/github/actions/workflow/status/saehm/DruidJS/release.yml?event=build-and-test) [![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/saehm/DruidJS)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/saehm/DruidJS/refs/heads/master/LICENCE) [![DOI:10.1109/VIS47514.2020.00029](https://img.shields.io/badge/DOI-10.1109%2FVIS47514.2020.00029-blue)](https://doi.org/10.1109/VIS47514.2020.00029) ### Resources
Translation:
## DruidJS — 차원 축소를 위한 자바스크립트 라이브러리. DruidJS는 차원 축소를 위한 자바스크립트 라이브러리입니다. 차원 축소를 통해 고차원 데이터를 데이터의 메서드별 특성을 유지하면서 저차원으로 투영할 수 있습니다. DruidJS는 구현된 차원 축소 방법들로 데이터셋을 쉽게 투영할 수 있게 합니다.
![Codecov](https://img.shields.io/codecov/c/github/saehm/DruidJS) ![NPM Downloads](https://img.shields.io/npm/dw/%40saehrimnir%2Fdruidjs) ![GitHub Actions Workflow Status](https://img.shields.io/github/actions/workflow/status/saehm/DruidJS/release.yml?event=build-and-test) [![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/saehm/DruidJS)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/saehm/DruidJS/refs/heads/master/LICENCE) [![DOI:10.1109/VIS47514.2020.00029](https://img.shields.io/badge/DOI-10.1109%2FVIS47514.2020.00029-blue)](https://doi.org/10.1109/VIS47514.2020.00029) ### 자료들

Content:
### Matrix

DruidJS uses internally the Matrix class for storing data. You can use it by creating a `druid.Matrix` object for instance with the function `from`, in example:
Translation:
### 행렬

DruidJS는 내부적으로 데이터를 저장하기 위해 Matrix 클래스를 사용합니다. 예를 들어 `from` 함수를 사용하여 `druid.Matrix` 객체를 생성하여 사용할 수 있습니다:

RowTranslations.originContent: DruidJS uses internally the Matrix class for storing data. You can use it by creating a `druid.Matrix` object for instance with the function `from`, in example:

Translation: 다음과 같이 프로그래밍 방식으로 `druid.Matrix` 객체를 생성할 수 있습니다:

RowTranslations.originContent: You can create a `druid.Matrix` object programmatically by:
RowTranslations.translatedContent: 다음과 같이 프로그래밍 방식으로 `druid.Matrix` 객체를 생성할 수 있습니다:

RowTranslations.originContent: let matrix = new druid.Matrix(rows, columns, fn);
RowTranslations.translatedContent: let matrix = new druid.Matrix(rows, columns, fn);

Content:
If `rows == columns`, then `matrix` would be a identity matrix.
A shortcut for a identity matrix is:

만약 `rows == columns` 이면, `matrix` 는 항등 행렬이 됩니다.
항등 행렬의 단축 표기법은 다음과 같습니다:

RowTranslations.translatedContent: 만약 `rows == columns` 이면, `matrix` 는 항등 행렬이 됩니다.

RowTranslations.originContent: A shortcut for a identity matrix is:
RowTranslations.translatedContent: 항등 행렬의 단축 표기법은 다음과 같습니다:

Content: There are more shortcuts for creating matrices:
Translation: 행렬을 생성하는 더 많은 단축키가 있습니다:

RowTranslations.translatedContent: 행렬을 생성하는 더 많은 단축키가 있습니다:

RowTranslations.originContent: There are more shortcuts for creating matrices:
let matrix = new druid.Matrix(3, 3, "zeros"); // matrix would be a 3x3 matrix with zeroes
RowTranslations.translatedContent: let matrix = new druid.Matrix(3, 3, "zeros"); // matrix would be a 3x3 matrix with zeroes

RowTranslations.originContent: let matrix = new druid.Matrix(3, 3, "center"); // matrix would be a 3x3 center matrix;
RowTranslations.translatedContent: let matrix = new druid.Matrix(3, 3, "center"); // matrix would be a 3x3 center matrix;

RowTranslations.originContent: let matrix = new druid.Matrix(3, 3, number); // matrix would b a 3x3 matrix filled with 'number'
RowTranslations.translatedContent: let matrix = new druid.Matrix(3, 3, number); // matrix would b a 3x3 matrix filled with 'number'

Content: If you want to use a `druid.Matrix` object, for instance, with [d3](https://d3js.org), you can use either the `to2dArray` property, the `iterate_rows` generator function, or just use the `druid.Matrix` object as an iterable (works with d3 since version 6).
Translation: 예를 들어 [d3](https://d3js.org)와 함께 `druid.Matrix` 객체를 사용하려면, `to2dArray` 속성, `iterate_rows` 제너레이터 함수, 또는 단순히 `druid.Matrix` 객체를 반복 가능(iterable)으로 사용하면 됩니다(버전 6부터 d3에서 작동).

RowTranslations.originContent: If you want to use a `druid.Matrix` object, for instance, with [d3](https://d3js.org), you can use either the `to2dArray` property, the `iterate_rows` generator function, or just use the `druid.Matrix` object as an iterable (works with d3 since version 6).
RowTranslations.translatedContent: 예를 들어 [d3](https://d3js.org)와 함께 `druid.Matrix` 객체를 사용하려면, `to2dArray` 속성, `iterate_rows` 제너레이터 함수, 또는 단순히 `druid.Matrix` 객체를 반복 가능(iterable)으로 사용하면 됩니다(버전 6부터 d3에서 작동).

Content:
```js
let data = await d3.csv("data.csv");
let matrix = druid.Matrix.from(data);
d3.selectAll("datapoints").data(matrix.to2dArray); //...
d3.selectAll("datapoints").data(matrix.iterate_rows()); //...
d3.selectAll("datapoints").data(matrix); //...
```
Translation:
```js
let data = await d3.csv("data.csv");
let matrix = druid.Matrix.from(data);
d3.selectAll("datapoints").data(matrix.to2dArray); //...
d3.selectAll("datapoints").data(matrix.iterate_rows()); //...
d3.selectAll("datapoints").data(matrix); //...
```
